content.en:
In fact, Ye Tian also wanted to cooperate with the Raccoon Blood Ancestor at this moment.

Without this cooperation, he wouldn't know where to get the Infinite Blood Stone, and once he broke through to the fourth stage, he would also have to face a lack of resources.

At that time, no matter how many other resources he has, he will not be able to make rapid progress in the fourth stage, and he will not be able to improve much in the infinite years.

Therefore, this time there was an opportunity to obtain the immeasurable blood gold stone, and he naturally had to seize it.

"Blood Ancestor, I can cooperate with you!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Seeing that Ye Tian agreed, the Bloody Great Ancestor was very excited.

After all, he couldn't cooperate with other fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Xuanqi Realm, and he didn't trust other fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

But Ye Tian is a person, he still trusts, at least Ye Tian released him, so he is willing to cooperate with Ye Tian, and Ye Tian's strength is strong enough.

What's more, Ye Tian is not afraid of death, he dares to work hard, at least he will not retreat easily at the critical moment.

This is his ideal partner!

Immediately, the Bloody Great Ancestor signed a contract with Ye Tian.

Subsequently, the Bloody Great Ancestor began to reveal some information.

"Endless Great Ancestor, the place where the immeasurable realm beast fell that I know is unlikely to be discovered by any force, but that place is a bit dangerous, there are some immeasurable ruin monsters dispatched, among the immeasurable realm ruins, the immeasurable ruin monsters are very common, the weaker ones are comparable to the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the third stage, and the stronger ones are comparable to the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage. Even if I knew of the nearest passage, I wouldn't be able to avoid encountering some immeasurable ruins. Therefore, without the strength of the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, they have no qualifications to connect to that place. The Bloody Great Ancestor confessed.

"Blood Ancestor, you haven't been to that place, why do you know about the existence of that place, and I'm sure other forces don't know, I'm curious where you got the news. Ye Tian asked.

The Blood Ancestor hesitated for a moment, and then said: "This has something to do with my origin, I used to be the pet of a certain Heavenly Ancestor, but not many Great Ancestors who know this secret are also afraid of this identity, because some fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms will not make a move on me." It is also because of this that the Heavenly Ancestor who sealed me only sealed me casually, and did not erase me!"

"Heavenly Ancestor!"

This was not the first time Ye Tian had heard of this word, he had obtained the token of the Silver Heng Heavenly Ancestor before.

It is said that this token involves an opportunity, but with Ye Tian's current strength, he is not qualified to contact this opportunity.

"How powerful is Heavenly Ancestor?"

Ye Tian was curious.

He only knew that in the Xuanqi Realm, the Heavenly Ancestor was an existence above the Great Ancestor, and even the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms were far inferior to a Heavenly Ancestor.

But about the deeds of the Heavenly Ancestor, there is hardly much that has been circulated.

All he knew was one Yinheng Heavenly Ancestor, and he didn't know anything else.

"Heavenly Ancestor, it's very powerful, you can easily kill a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, let alone a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and you can't even withstand the breath of a Heavenly Ancestor. In the entire Xuanqi Realm, the number of Heavenly Ancestors born in total was less than five. For example, there was a Heavenly Ancestor born in Taichen Palace, and at the beginning of the Xuanqi Pavilion, a Heavenly Ancestor was also born, but that Heavenly Ancestor fell and died outside the realm, and it was precisely because of this incident that the Xuanqi Pavilion completely declined. But Xuanqi Pavilion still has some background after all, so for endless years, Xuanqi Pavilion is still barely ranked among the top powers. "

The Blood Ancestor then revealed: "The Heavenly Ancestor I followed was the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, and it was the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor who casually killed that Infinite Realm Beast, and I followed the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor. It's just that later, the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor wanted to go to a very dangerous place, so it was inconvenient to carry me, so he threw me in a hopeless place. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian was able to completely understand why the Raccoon Blood Ancestor knew the place where the Infinite Realm Beast fell, and there was no doubt in his heart.

"When are you leaving?"

Ye Tian asked.

"In a little while, we'll have to prepare some. To enter the Infinite Realm Ruins, you must carry a ruin stone, otherwise it is easy to attract the attention of the Infinite Ruins monsters. I don't have any ruin stones on me, so I have to find a way to trade two ruin stones!"

"Ruins are rare, aren't they?" Ye Tian was worried that if he couldn't buy ruin stones, it would be troublesome!

The Blood Ancestor smiled and said: "Don't worry, some forces are willing to trade the ruin stones, after all, the number of ruin stones is not a minority, some of the fourth stage great ancestors themselves dare not enter the Infinite Realm Ruins, but they are willing to sell the unexpectedly obtained ruins, and they are even happy to see other Great Ancestors use the ruins to enter the Infinite Realm Ruins to die!"

"Then wait until the transaction is reached to the ruins, and then go to the immeasurable ruins!"

Ye Tian then waited in the ruins stone tower.

Not long after, the Blood Ancestor successfully traded two ruin stones to find Ye Tian.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor left the Ruins Stone Tower and headed for the Infinite Realm Ruins.

The third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms who want to enter the immeasurable realm ruins from the Xuanqi Realm cannot enter them at all without going through special methods and channels.

However, the Blood Ancestor has a passage, and this passage is in the hopeless land.

......

After taking Ye Tian across the Voidless Galaxy, the Blood Ancestor shuttled through the territories of the Hopeless Land and came to the immeasurable sea of suffering in the Hopeless Land.

"That passage is in the immeasurable sea of suffering?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"Yes!" the Blooded Great Ancestor said: "The Infinite Sea of Bitterness is the most dangerous place in the Hopeless Land, there are not even a few high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the entire Hopeless Land, but there are a bunch of lost giant beasts comparable to high-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Infinite Sea of Suffering, don't you think it's strange? It stands to reason that with the resources of the Hopeless Land or the resources of the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering, there are simply not enough to support so many lost giant beasts. In fact, the Lost Behemoth is a creature that mutates after being infected by the energy of the Immeasurable Ruins. And the Lost Behemoth is infected by this energy, and it also has some sequelae, such as low intelligence, and the need to sleep often, etc. And this passage was casually sealed by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, so without the strength of the Heavenly Ancestor, even if he entered here, he would not know the situation here. "

"No wonder!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

At the beginning, he felt that the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering was too strange, but he didn't expect that it would also involve the Immeasurable Realm Ruins and Heavenly Ancestors.

"Let's go, let's go in!"

The Blood Ancestor and Ye Tian shuttled into the immeasurable sea of suffering.

The Lost Land of the Immeasurable Sea of Suffering is also the loss of the first-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, which does not have any lost effect on a powerhouse like the Raccoon Blood Ancestor.

And Ye Tian has the talent of the Lost Behemoth, and his strength is even stronger, so naturally he will not be affected.

Soon.

Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor came to the deepest part of the Infinite Sea of Suffering, where a black mountain range appeared, surrounded by a number of Lost Behemoths, each of which was comparable in strength to a high-level Immeasurable Lifeform.

"Before, I hadn't discovered the Lost Behemoth here, and this mountain range was also hidden, so I couldn't find it at all. Now that the strength has become stronger, it is easy to spot them!" Ye Tian said darkly.

"This is it!"

The Blood Ancestor pointed to the black mountain range.
